eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Snohomish, WA; at 10:23 PM on JUL 9, 2026 Effective until 10:53 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test, only a test, of the Emergency Alert System, from the Snohomish County 911. Had this been an actual alert, this system would bring you important information. No action is needed. This is only a test.
